Orders & Delivery

Shipping & Delivery

All items are handmade after the order is received. Please allow time for me to create your piece with care before it ships. Once your order is ready, it will be shipped and you will receive tracking information.

For questions about your order, email me at
damarisfinlin@gmail.com

The Story Behind DF

Made by hand,
given with heart

Every creation begins with a feeling, a spark of inspiration. What started as a love for handmade beauty became a place where creativity and heart come together.

Each piece is crafted with intention, made to bring emotion, confidence, and a touch of magic into everyday life. From jewelry to handmade accessories and fabric bags, every detail is chosen with care.

I believe the things we wear should feel personal, a reflection of who we are. I choose to create slowly and with heart, honoring individuality through every piece.

My hope is that you feel something special when you receive one of my creations, as if it were made just for you.

Thank you for supporting handmade artistry and allowing my creations to be part of your story. â€” DF Creations
